response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES, AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES ANGEL USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 80 DIVIDED BY 2 EQUALS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE: LARGE, ENVELOPES, LETTERS, TOTAL, DIVIDED, BY, EQUALS, 40, THEREFORE, ANGEL, USED, 40. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES. UNIQUE WORDS ARE: LARGE, ENVELOPES, LETTERS, TOTAL, DIVIDED, BY, EQUALS, 40, THEREFORE, ANGEL, USED, 40. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES. UNIQUE WORDS ARE: LARGE, ENVELOPES, LETTERS, TOTAL, DIVIDED, BY, EQUALS, 40, THEREFORE, ANGEL, USED, 40. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES. UNIQUE WORDS ARE: LARGE, ENVELOPES, LETTERS, TOTAL, DIVIDED, BY, EQUALS, 40, THEREFORE, ANGEL, USED, 40. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES. UNIQUE WORDS ARE: LARGE, ENVELOPES, LETTERS, TOTAL, DIVIDED, BY, EQUALS, 40, THEREFORE, ANGEL, USED, 40. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES. UNIQUE WORDS ARE: LARGE, ENVELOPES, LETTERS, TOTAL, DIVIDED, BY, EQUALS, 40, THEREFORE, ANGEL, USED, 40. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES.
